LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED.COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***AFTER HEARING: AN ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2023 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Plaintiff ANTHONY FERREIRO's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff ANTHONY FERREIRO's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After Hearing: An order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
